LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GERALD MEISEL'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FROM WAGE GARNISHMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S FINANCIAL STATEMENT DEMONSTRATES THAT THE DIFFERENCE BETWEEN HIS MONTHLY INCOME AND MONTHLY EXPENSES IS INSUBSTANTIAL AND THEREFORE HIS WAGES ARE EXEMPT. THE SHERIFF IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: SUZANNE BOLANOS; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER : MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489 =302/SB

LAW AND MOTION 302, CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF GERALD P. MEISEL IS UPHELD (GRANTED). WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: ANGIE DINER, CSR NO. 9581, E-MAIL: ADINER@SFTC.ORG, (L&M302)

calendar.matters:
Hearing On Claim Of Exemption (Add-On)
Off Calendar Sep-26-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Gerald P. Meisel, In Propria Persona (415-317-6236) appears as self-represented claimant/judgment debtor defendant

No other appearance is made in this matter. The Court hears from the claimant and is satisfied there is good cause to uphold claim of exemtion.

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

Claim Of Exemption of Gerald P. Meisel is upheld (granted). Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Angie Diner, CSR No. 9581, e-mail: adiner@sftc.org, (L&M302)

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Aug-25-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - GERALD MEISEL, TEL. NO. 1-415-317-6236, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Gerald Meisel's claim of exemption from wage garnishment is granted. Defendant's financial statement demonstrates that the difference between his monthly income and monthly expenses is insubstantial and therefore his wages are exempt. The sheriff is directed to release any earnings held to the judgment debtor. Order signed. Judge: Suzanne Bolanos; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/sb

Ntc Of Hrg On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Sep-16-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Gerald Meisel, defendant/judgment debtor/claimant, appearing on his own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: Mr. Meisel provided the Court with copies of his paystub. The matter was discussed. For good cause and to the satisfaction of the Court, DEFENDANT GERALD MEISEL'S Claim Of Exemption is granted. In addition, the levying officer is directed to release any funds held to the judgment debtor. (Order signed after hearing.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
